data.name: Sample - Veeam Backup & Replication - 1.0.0
data.description: Veeam Backup & Replication is a data protection and disaster recovery solution that provides backup, recovery, and replication for virtual, physical, and cloud-based workloads.

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all servers and hosts added to the backup infrastructure based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Server List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Server List

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all unstructured data servers available on a backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Unstructured Data Server List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Unstructured Data Server List

routes.name: Start-> Get Unstructured Data Server List

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all Microsoft Entra ID tenants added to the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Microsoft Entra ID Tenant List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Microsoft Entra ID Tenant List

steps.name: Get Microsoft Entra ID Tenant List

arguments.name: Veeam Backup & Replication
arguments.operationTitle: Get Microsoft Entra ID Tenant List

routes.name: Start-> Get Microsoft Entra ID Tenant List

workflows.description: Creates a new malware event based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Create Malware Event

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Create Malware Event

machine.fqdn: Fully Qualified Domain Name of the machine.
machine.uuid: BIOS UUID of the machine. Specify the UUID in the 8-4-4-4-12 format: xxxxxxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxx-xxxxxxxxxxxx.

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all malware events created on the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Malware Event List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Malware Event List

workflows.description: Scans backups with antivirus or YARA rules based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Scan Backups with Antivirus or YARA Rules

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Scan Backups with Antivirus or YARA Rules

steps.name: Scan Backups with Antivirus or YARA Rules

arguments.name: Veeam Backup & Replication
arguments.operationTitle: Scan Backups with Antivirus or YARA Rules

routes.name: Start-> Scan Backups with Antivirus or YARA Rules

workflows.description: Starts security & compliance analyzer on the backup server.
workflows.name: Start Security & Compliance Analyzer

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Start Security & Compliance Analyzer

workflows.description: Retrieves best practices compliance result from the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Security & Compliance Analyzer Results

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Security & Compliance Analyzer Results

routes.name: Start-> Get Security Compliance Analyzer Results

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Start Configuration Backup

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all servers that are added to the backup infrastructure based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Managed Server List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Managed Server List

workflows.description: Starts instant recovery of a VMware vSphere VM to VMware vSphere. You can recover a VM from the specified restore point to the original location with initial VM settings, or to any location but with different settings.
workflows.name: Start Instant Recovery

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Start Instant Recovery

workflows.description: Starts quick backup for the specified VMware vSphere or VMware Cloud Director VM.
workflows.name: Start Quick Backup

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Start Quick Backup

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all backups that are created on or imported to the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Backup List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Backup List

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all repository states. The states include repository location and brief statistics, such as repository capacity, free and used space based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Repository State List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Repository State List

workflows.description: Retrieves a list of all restore points created on the backup server based on the input parameters that you have specified.
workflows.name: Get Restore Point List

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Get Restore Point List

workflows.description: Sends an API request to any Veeam Backup & Replication API endpoint based on specified HTTP method, endpoint, and other input parameters that you have specified, enabling flexible API interactions tailored to user needs.
workflows.name: Execute an API Request

arguments.title: Veeam Backup & Replication: Execute an API Request
